scripts.build: bun run build:library && bunx shopify hydrogen build --codegen --path examples/hydrogen
scripts.dev: bun run build:library && bunx shopify hydrogen dev --codegen --port 3001 --path examples/hydrogen
scripts.release:check: bun run test && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run --filter judgeme-react pack:check && bun run --filter judgeme-react publint
